query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_pricing.pricing_rate_cards
                (id, tenant_id, sku_id, strategy,
                 floor_price, ceiling_price,
                 effective_from, effective_until,
                 description, created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                strategy = VALUES(strategy),
                floor_price = VALUES(floor_price),
                ceiling_price = VALUES(ceiling_price),
                effective_from = VALUES(effective_from),
                effective_until = VALUES(effective_until),
                description = VALUES(description),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
